**`/home/user/myproject/computed.js`** — creates an extended Prisma client with a `fullLabel` result extension on the `User` model, upserts a test user, queries it back, and writes the result to `computed_result.json`.

The `fullLabel` virtual field (`"Computed <computed@example.com>"`) is computed at query time by the `$extends` result component — it is never stored in the database. Copies of both files are saved to `/logs/artifacts/`.

**`/home/user/myproject/computed.js`** — creates an extended Prisma client with a `fullLabel` result extension on the `User` model, upserts a test user, queries it back, and writes the result to `computed_result.json`.

**`/home/user/myproject/computed_result.json`** — output:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "email": "computed@example.com",
  "name": "Computed",
  "fullLabel": "Computed <computed@example.com>"
}
```

The `fullLabel` virtual field (`"Computed <computed@example.com>"`) is computed at query time by the `$extends` result component — it is never stored in the database. Copies of both files are saved to `/logs/artifacts/`.
